Impact Area: Navigate to Setup > Customization > Sub-form page
Description: Verify Sub-form page loads under Setup > Customization. Confirm breadcrumbs show 'Setup > Customization > Sub-form'. Verify page title and layout.

Impact Area: Sub form section renders on CI Details page
Pre-Requisite: CI exists with sub form configured in CI Type
Description: Navigate to CI Details. Verify sub form section appears with correct section name. Verify column headers match UDF field names.

Impact Area: Create sub form with empty name
Description: Attempt to create sub form with blank name. Verify client-side validation error.

Impact Area: Empty state for sub form with no entries
Pre-Requisite: CI Details with sub form configured but no data
Description: Verify sub form section shows appropriate empty state message.
Verify SDAdmin has full CRUD access to sub forms.

Impact Area: Create CI relationship via direct API
Pre-Requisite: Two CIs and relationship type exist
Description: POST /api/v3/ci_relationships with source, destination, relationship_type. Verify 2000.
